# Christmas Northwest
> Professional Christmas light installation serving Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, Bothell, Kenmore, Woodinville, Redmond, Sammamish, and the Greater Seattle area. Owner-operated by Dylan Thornsberry. Based in Kenmore, WA.

## Services
- [Christmas Light Installation](https://christmasnw.com/services): Residential roofline lighting, tree wrapping, commercial displays, custom designs. Starting at $800. All-inclusive: design, install, maintenance, takedown, and storage.
- [Permanent Outdoor Lighting](https://christmasnw.com/permanent-lighting): Year-round architectural LED lighting with smartphone app control.
- [Year-Round Services](https://christmasnw.com/year-round-services): Landscape lighting, bistro lights, gutter cleaning.

## Key Facts
- Phone: (425) 215-0935
- Email: christmaslightsnw@gmail.com
- Location: Kenmore, WA 98028
- Service area: 15+ cities across Greater Seattle and the Eastside
- Google rating: 5.0 stars with 85+ reviews
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Founded: 2021
- Price range: $800-$6,000+ for residential; commercial by custom quote
- Includes: design, installation, maintenance, takedown, and climate-controlled storage
